name: URANIUM ENERGY CORP
summary: PART I Uranium Energy Corp. is a fast growing, uranium mining company listed on the NYSE American. UEC is working towards fueling the global demand for carbon-free nuclear energy, a key solution to climate change, and energy source for the low-carbon future. UEC is a pure-play uranium company and is advancing its next generation of low-cost, in-situ recovery ( ISR ) mining uranium projects, and which ISR mining process is expected to reduce the impact on the environment as compared to convention...
